data.body: 6 changes on stack (all hooks-green, plan-review PASS): +8d7d260e3 drake (silent-success NativeOutput parity + schema json_repair + faulty-output reask; #5221 deferred to follow-on 8303). 5/7 children done. REMAINING: anole (agent-build invariants — tests + one-time construction capability check), blackbear (INTEGRATOR lands last: two-scope gate posture across 3 gates, exit-11 contract, coverage.resolution_class/diagnostic on 3 verdict schemas, never-sign guard, 4 ADRs, final runner reconciliation). Then Gerrit landing. Starting anole review --ref HEAD.
